heading: Administrative procedure
label: 1959 Administrative procedure
text: The administrative procedure and judicial review provisions of subchapter II of chapter 5 and chapter 7 of title 5 shall apply to all proceedings under this chapter, , and section 1730d of this title.section 1829b of this title1See References in Text note below.1
